role_summary: the audit manager leads audit engagements, ensuring accuracy, compliance, and risk  mitigation in financial reporting.   key respo nsibilities:   • plan and manage statutory, internal, and special audits   • supervise audit teams and review audit work papers   • identify financial and operational risks   • ensure compliance with auditing standards and laws   • prepare audit reports and present findings t o management   • coordinate with clients and senior leadership
qualifications: • qualified ca   • strong audit and risk assessment expertise   • leadership and team management skills   • knowledge of auditing standards and regulatory frameworks
